---
title: "Shilpa Sundar | Portfolio"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<!-- ── Site Header ───────────────────────────── -->
<header class="site-header">
  <div class="container">
    <span class="site-name">Shilpa Sundar &nbsp;·&nbsp; Portfolio</span>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ── Hero / About ──────────────────────────── -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="hero">
      <img class="headshot" src="assets/headshot.jpg" alt="Shilpa Sundar">
      <div class="hero-text">
        <h1>Shilpa Sundar, PharmD, MPS</h1>
        <p class="hero-subtitle">PhD Researcher &nbsp;·&nbsp; Biomedical AI &amp; Knowledge Graphs &nbsp;·&nbsp; UNC Chapel Hill</p>
        <div class="bio">
          <p>Shilpa Sundar is a PhD researcher at UNC Chapel Hill with a concentration in Computational Knowledge Engineering, Health Informatics, and Genetics. Her research at the Translational and Integrative Sciences Lab (TISLab) focuses on graph-based deep learning, biomedical knowledge graphs, and scalable ML systems — with applications in rare disease drug repurposing and drug-drug interaction prediction.</p>
          <p>With 5+ years of experience as a healthcare consultant and commercial data analyst at Clarivate Analytics and Trinity Life Sciences, she brings clinical domain expertise, market strategy, and applied ML to complex biomedical problems — consulting for pharma and MedTech clients across EU, US, and JAPAC markets on pricing, market access, and data-driven forecasting.</p>
          <p>Recent highlights: Winner of the 2023 Penn Healthcare Case Competition (Wharton), Nucleate RTP Finalist (2024), and participant in the NVIDIA-sponsored AWS Open Science Hackathon on Knowledge Graphs (2025).</p>
        </div>
        <div class="social-links">
          <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14" class="social-btn" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub</a>
          <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/drshilpasundar/" class="social-btn" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
          <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4097-3395" class="social-btn" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-orcid"></i> ORCID</a>
          <a href="mailto:shilpasundar1214@gmail.com" class="social-btn"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> Email</a>
          <a href="assets/resume.pdf" class="social-btn cv" download="Shilpa Sundar Resume.pdf"><i class="fas fa-download"></i> Download CV</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ── Career Timeline ───────────────────────── -->
<section id="timeline" class="timeline-section">
  <div class="container">
    <h2 class="section-title">Career</h2>
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <span class="timeline-year">2013</span>
        <span class="timeline-event">PharmD — Manipal University, India</span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <span class="timeline-year">2019</span>
        <span class="timeline-event">Associate Consultant &rarr; Research Associate — Clarivate Analytics</span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <span class="timeline-year">2022</span>
        <span class="timeline-event">Associate Consultant — Trinity Life Sciences</span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <span class="timeline-year">2023</span>
        <span class="timeline-event">MPS in Biomedical &amp; Health Informatics — UNC Chapel Hill (GPA 4.0)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <span class="timeline-year">2024</span>
        <span class="timeline-event">PhD Candidate — TISLab, UNC Chapel Hill</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ── Projects ──────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="projects">
  <div class="container">
    <h2 class="section-title">Projects</h2>
    <div class="projects-grid">

      <!-- 1. RotatE -->
      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-title">RotatE Knowledge Graph Embeddings</div>
        <p class="project-desc">Applied TracInCP influence scoring to RotatE-based knowledge graph embeddings to identify the most influential training subgraphs. Combines graph representation learning with interpretability methods to surface which training examples most shape model predictions.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Knowledge Graphs</span>
          <span class="tag">Graph Embeddings</span>
          <span class="tag">RotatE</span>
          <span class="tag">TracInCP</span>
          <span class="tag">PyTorch</span>
        </div>
        <div class="figure-placeholder"><i class="fas fa-project-diagram"></i></div>
        <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14/RotatEKnowledgeGraphEmbedding" class="btn-github" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
      </div>

      <!-- 2. Biomedical KG Scoring -->
      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-title">Biomedical KG Relevance Scoring</div>
        <p class="project-desc">A reproducible scoring rubric to evaluate 91 primary knowledge sources across ROBOKOP-KG and RTX-KG2 for AI-aided drug repurposing. Each source is scored on four criteria and assigned HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW relevance, enabling principled source selection for downstream ML. Part of the Every Cure Matrix project.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Knowledge Graphs</span>
          <span class="tag">Drug Repurposing</span>
          <span class="tag">Biomedical AI</span>
          <span class="tag">FAIR</span>
        </div>
        <img class="project-figure" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Shilpasundar14/biomedical-kg-relevance-scoring/main/figures/scoring_framework_infographic.jpg" alt="Scoring Framework Infographic">
        <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14/biomedical-kg-relevance-scoring" class="btn-github" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
      </div>

      <!-- 3. Monarch KG -->
      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-title">Monarch Knowledge Graph Cluster Analysis</div>
        <p class="project-desc">Analyzed the Monarch Initiative knowledge graph — comprising genes, diseases, and biological relationships — using K-means and hierarchical clustering to uncover gene-disease association patterns. Visualized latent structure with t-SNE, UMAP, and heatmaps.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Knowledge Graphs</span>
          <span class="tag">Clustering</span>
          <span class="tag">t-SNE</span>
          <span class="tag">UMAP</span>
          <span class="tag">R</span>
        </div>
        <img class="project-figure" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Shilpasundar14/Monarch-Knowledge-Graph-Analysis-Project/main/figures/labelled_tsne_plot.png" alt="t-SNE cluster plot">
        <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14/Monarch-Knowledge-Graph-Analysis-Project" class="btn-github" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
      </div>

      <!-- 4. NLP / BERT -->
      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-title">NLP Sentiment Analysis — BERT &amp; Transformers</div>
        <p class="project-desc">Fine-tuned BERT, DistilBERT, RoBERTa, and BERTweet for 4-class tweet sentiment classification on the Kaggle NLP Sentiment Analysis XM competition. Systematically layered improvements — learning rate scheduling, early stopping, cross-validation — to isolate each technique's contribution. Evaluates whether domain-specialized pretraining (BERTweet: 850M+ tweets) outperforms general-purpose transformers.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">NLP</span>
          <span class="tag">Transformers</span>
          <span class="tag">BERT</span>
          <span class="tag">BERTweet</span>
          <span class="tag">Fine-tuning</span>
          <span class="tag">Python</span>
        </div>
        <img class="project-figure" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Shilpasundar14/nlp-sentiment-analysis-bert/main/figures/model_accuracy_comparison.png" alt="Model accuracy comparison">
        <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14/nlp-sentiment-analysis-bert" class="btn-github" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
      </div>

      <!-- 5. Rainfall Prediction -->
      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-title">Binary Rainfall Prediction — 14-Model ML Pipeline</div>
        <p class="project-desc">A systematic ML experiment comparing 14 models — single classifiers, voting ensembles, stratified K-fold ensembles, and two-layer stacking — for binary rainfall prediction (Kaggle Playground Series S5E3). Each added layer of complexity is evaluated against the one before it. Meta-model stacking with an LGBM meta-learner trained on out-of-fold predictions yielded the best AUC-ROC generalization.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
          <span class="tag">Ensemble Methods</span>
          <span class="tag">Stacking</span>
          <span class="tag">LightGBM</span>
          <span class="tag">XGBoost</span>
          <span class="tag">Python</span>
        </div>
        <img class="project-figure" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Shilpasundar14/binary-rainfall-prediction/main/plots/Combined%2014%20models%20plot.png" alt="14 model comparison plot">
        <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14/binary-rainfall-prediction" class="btn-github" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
      </div>

      <!-- 6. DDI Benchmark -->
      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-title">Comparative DDI Prediction Benchmark</div>
        <p class="project-desc">Benchmarks graph-based ML and deep learning models — including GNNs, SumGNN, KGNN, and EmerGNN — for drug-drug interaction prediction. Integrates multimodal data across molecular structures, pharmacological networks, and knowledge graphs. This work is ongoing; a manuscript is currently in preparation.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">Graph Neural Networks</span>
          <span class="tag">Drug-Drug Interactions</span>
          <span class="tag">Deep Learning</span>
          <span class="tag">Biomedical AI</span>
        </div>
        <div class="figure-placeholder"><i class="fas fa-atom"></i></div>
        <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14/Comparative-DDI-Prediction-Benchmark-Study" class="btn-github" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
      </div>

      <!-- 7. Legal Interoperability -->
      <div class="project-card">
        <div class="project-title">Legal Interoperability in Biomedical KGs</div>
        <p class="project-desc">A systematic licensing audit of 39 biomedical data sources, treating legal constraints as first-class FAIR infrastructure. Each source is classified into one of five operational reuse categories based on license type, commercial permissions, redistribution rights, and ShareAlike obligations. This work is ongoing; a manuscript is currently in preparation.</p>
        <div class="tags">
          <span class="tag">FAIR Data</span>
          <span class="tag">Biomedical KGs</span>
          <span class="tag">Legal Interoperability</span>
          <span class="tag">Data Governance</span>
        </div>
        <div class="figure-placeholder"><i class="fas fa-balance-scale"></i></div>
        <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14/Licensing-and-Terms-of-Use-Assessment" class="btn-github" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> View on GitHub</a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div><!-- /.container -->
</section>

<!-- ── Footer ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<footer class="footer">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="footer-links">
      <a href="mailto:shilpasundar1214@gmail.com" class="footer-link"><i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> shilpasundar1214@gmail.com</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/Shilpasundar14" class="footer-link" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-github"></i> GitHub</a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/drshilpasundar/" class="footer-link" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4097-3395" class="footer-link" target="_blank"><i class="fab fa-orcid"></i> ORCID</a>
    </div>
    <p class="copyright">&copy; 2026 Shilpa Sundar</p>
  </div>
</footer>
```
